tags.name: Statistics
tags.description: Read-only errand statistics for the caseworker interface

tags.name: Permits
tags.description: Permits issued on an errand: validity period, conditions and status. Revoking sets the status to REVOKED.

tags.name: Errand Types
tags.description: Describes the errand types: their statuses, stakeholder roles and the fields a type's data payload should carry, as form guidance for clients.

tags.name: Referrals
tags.description: Referrals/consultations on an errand: receiving authority, due date, free-text response and status (SENT → RESPONDED).

tags.name: Conversation
tags.description: Messages between caseworker and applicant on an errand

tags.name: Financial Assistance
tags.description: Ekonomiskt bistånd (EB) errands. Create against one of the three application-type slugs (financial-assistance-new / -renewal / -supplementary); read and replace the typed data via the shared financial-assistance path.

tags.name: Errand decisions
tags.description: Decision audit trail on an errand. Stores both system-generated decisions (e.g. DMN-evaluated recommendations from a BPMN process) and human decisions (e.g. handläggare APPROVE/REJECT), distinguished by `decisionType`.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: User-facing notifications raised against an errand. Recipients (`ownerId`) acknowledge them when seen; expired ones are purged by a daily background job.

tags.name: Status History
tags.description: Status transition log for an errand

tags.name: Process messages
tags.description: Send BPMN message correlation events to the process instance currently running for an errand

put.summary: Acknowledge all notifications on an errand
put.description: Sets `acknowledged=true` on every unacknowledged notification belonging to the errand.

get.description: The FC income rows the EB process prepared (not yet created in Lifecare) for the handläggare to review and edit before a beslut. 404 when no draft exists yet.

put.description: Replace the draft's income rows with the handläggare's edit and mark it edited — the daily SSBTEK refresh then preserves these rows and surfaces newly-arrived income as a NEW_INCOME warning instead of overwriting. The edited draft is what gets posted to Lifecare on a beslut.

get.description: Query for errands with optional spring-filter expression

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Multipart request. The 'request' part carries the application (JSON); the optional 'attachments' part carries the citizen's supporting files (any type). typeSlug is one of financial-assistance-new, financial-assistance-renewal, financial-assistance-supplementary. Each attachment is stored on the errand, and a single combined PDF merging them all is generated and stored alongside.
Creates a new stakeholder on the errand

post.summary: Send a BPMN message to the running process for an errand
post.description: Correlates a BPMN message (e.g. a handläggare's APPROVE/REJECT decision, an external event) to the process instance whose business key equals this errand id. The matching receive task or message catch event resumes with the supplied process variables.

404.description: No process instance is waiting for this message on this errand

post.summary: Revoke all permits on the errand

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.summary: Post a message on the errand
post.description: Multipart request. The 'message' part carries the message (JSON); the optional 'attachments' part carries the files to attach (any type).

get.description: Fetches all attachment metadata for the errand

post.description: Uploads a new attachment for the errand

post.summary: Read whether the Lifecare utbetalning has been effectuated
post.description: Reads whether the manual Lifecare utbetalning for the applicant and application month has been registered, returning the effectuated flag and (when effectuated) the payment date. caremanagement makes no payment — utbetalning is a manual handläggare step in Lifecare; the process polls this to detect when it is done.

Reports whether this month's classified incomes cover every income type the previous normberäkning had (informationComplete + missingIncomeTypes), records the income warnings on the errand as a single Decision(RECOMMENDATION), and reflects completeness in the errand status (KOMPLETTERING ⇄ VANTAR_PA_BESLUT). Does NOT create a normberäkning in Lifecare — the EB process calls this each daily loop. Use /commit after a beslut to create it in Lifecare.

post.summary: Create the normberäkning in Lifecare (after beslut)
post.description: Builds the normberäkning from the classified incomes and creates it in Lifecare FC, returning the created calculation id. Called once a beslut is taken — never during the daily SSBTEK loop.
Given an applicant (and an optional co-applicant) suggests which application — nyansökan / återansökan / tilläggsansökan — to offer, checking this system and Lifecare (best-effort).

Builds the aktualisering against the applicant's Lifecare FC aktualisering proposal and creates it in Lifecare, returning the created aktualisering id. When the request carries an errandId, the creation is recorded on the errand as a Decision(ACTUALISATION) for the audit trail.

get.description: Fetches the errand that matches the provided id

patch.description: Patches the errand with the supplied attributes
Partial update. Only `acknowledged`, `description`, `content`, `type`, and `subType` are honoured; other fields in the body are ignored.

patch.summary: Acknowledge or close an EB income warning
patch.description: A handläggare acknowledges (seen, kept on record) or closes (dismisses) a warning. Re-opening to OPEN is not allowed.

get.description: Aggregates the number of errands per status and per assigned user, optionally filtered by errand type and creation date.

parameters.name: typeSlug
parameters.description: Filter on errand type (module). Omit for statistics across all types.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Count only errands created at or after this point in time (ISO-8601).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Count only errands created at or before this point in time (ISO-8601).

get.summary: List notifications for a recipient across errands

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

get.summary: List the EB income warnings on an errand
get.description: The acknowledgeable income warnings the handläggare reviews — unhandled incomes, significant changes, and income types still missing from SSBTEK. The daily prepare step reconciles them.

Returns the household children from the applicant's most recent Lifecare normberäkning to pre-fill an EB återansökan. The applicant is identified by partyId (resolved to a personnummer via the citizen service). Only children are pre-filled — the sökande is the logged-in citizen and the medsökande comes from the portal. Best-effort — degrades to an empty result (lifecareChecked=false) when the partyId cannot be resolved or Lifecare is unreachable.
Returns the descriptor for every registered errand type.
Returns the descriptor for a single errand type slug, e.g. financial-assistance-renewal.

DraftIncomeRow.description: One income row of the draft normberäkning (FC income type + amounts).

applicantAmount.description: The applicant's amount for this income type

applicantAmountDate.description: The date the applicant's amount is attributed to (ISO)

coApplicantAmount.description: The co-applicant's amount for this income type

coApplicantAmountDate.description: The date the co-applicant's amount is attributed to (ISO)

NormberakningDraft.description: The (editable) draft normberäkning — FC income rows, not yet created in Lifecare.

edited.description: Whether a handläggare has edited the draft (the daily refresh then preserves the rows)

updated.description: When the draft was last updated

Asset.description: An asset owned by the applicant or co-applicant.

description.description: Free text description of the asset

purchasePrice.description: Price paid when the asset was purchased

companyAssetSum.description: Total sum of the company's assets

purchaseDate.description: The date the asset was purchased

Child.description: A child included in the financial assistance application.

partyId.description: Party id (personId GUID) of the child

residenceExtent.description: Extent of residence in the home

daysInHome.description: Number of days per month the child lives in the home

Cost.description: A cost the applicant is applying for assistance with.

otherSubType.description: Sub type when the cost type is OTHER

specification.description: Free text specification of the cost

recipientOrPeriod.description: Recipient of the cost or the period it covers

FinancialAssistanceData.description: The typed financial assistance application payload.

periodMonth.description: The month the application period concerns

periodYear.description: The year the application period concerns

normType.description: The norm type used for the calculation

hasChildrenUnder21.description: Whether the household has children under 21

childrenResidenceChanged.description: Whether the children's residence situation has changed

childrenResidenceChangeDescription.description: Description of the change in children's residence

housingPersonCount.description: Total number of persons (adults and children) living in the housing

housingDescription.description: Free text description of the housing

housingChanged.description: Whether the housing situation has changed

examples: Flyttade till mindre lägenhet i maj

hasPendingBenefits.description: Whether the household has pending benefits

staysInMunicipality.description: Whether the applicant stays in the municipality

attestation.description: Whether the applicant has attested the application

Income.description: An income reported by the applicant or co-applicant.

incomeDate.description: The date the income was received

JobApplication.description: A job application reported by the applicant or co-applicant.

person.description: Which person submitted the job application

applicationDate.description: The date the job application was submitted

PendingBenefit.description: A benefit the applicant has applied for but not yet received a decision on.

applicantName.description: Name of the person who applied for the benefit

Person.description: A person (applicant or co-applicant) on the financial assistance application.

partyId.description: Party id (personId GUID) of the person

needsInterpreter.description: Whether the person needs an interpreter

hadWorkLast12Months.description: Whether the person had work during the last 12 months

hadWorkDescription.description: Description of the work the person had

clearingNumber.description: Clearing number of the bank account

otherPaymentDescription.description: Description of the payment method when OTHER

paymentSameAsPrevious.description: Whether the payment details are the same as previously used

email.description: Email address used for notifications about the application

phone.description: Phone number used for SMS notifications about the application

notifyByEmail.description: Whether the person wants notifications about the application by email

notifyBySms.description: Whether the person wants notifications about the application by SMS

PlannedActivity.description: A planned activity for the applicant or co-applicant.

Planning.description: The applicant's or co-applicant's planning towards self-sufficiency.

Lookup.description: Lookup model - metadata entry (category, status, type, role, contact reason)

typeSlug.description: Registered errand type slug — validated against ErrandTypeRegistry

processDefinitionName.description: Name of the Operaton process definition to start when the errand is created

processInstanceId.description: Id of the Operaton process instance started for this errand

CreateFinancialAssistanceRequest.description: Request to create a financial assistance errand.

data.description: The typed financial assistance application payload

key.description: The key of the contact channel

value.description: The value of the contact channel

role.description: Role of the stakeholder — validated against StakeholderRoleRegistry for the errand's typeSlug

Referral.description: A referral/consultation on an errand, with the receiving authority, due date and status.

sentAt.description: Date the referral was sent. Defaults to today when omitted.

ProcessMessageRequest.description: Request body for correlating a BPMN message to the process instance currently running for an errand. The errand id is used as the process business key, so the message is delivered to that specific process. Use this whenever something outside the process (a handläggare action, an external event, an admin override) needs to resume or interact with a running process instance.

messageName.description: BPMN message name, matching the `name` attribute on the `<bpmn:message>` element the receive task references

variables.description: Process variables to set when correlating the message

Permit.description: An issued permit with a validity period, conditions and status.

validFrom.description: Valid from (decision date). Defaults to today when omitted.

validUntil.description: Valid until and including. Open-ended when omitted.

examples: Unloading may only take place during daytime.

Notification.description: User-facing notification raised against an errand. Mutable: callers acknowledge (acknowledged=true) when the recipient has seen it; expired notifications are purged by a background job.

errandId.description: Id of the errand the notification belongs to (server-assigned from path)

ownerId.description: User id of the recipient (the user who should see this notification)

createdBy.description: User or system id that produced the notification. Automatically acknowledged if equal to ownerId.

acknowledged.description: Acknowledgement state. On PATCH, null leaves the value unchanged; true/false sets it. The bulk-acknowledge endpoint flips this to true for every notification on an errand.

expires.description: Timestamp after which the notification is eligible for cleanup (server-assigned)

CreateMessage.description: A new message in the errand's conversation

direction.description: Direction: OUTBOUND = caseworker → applicant, INBOUND = applicant → caseworker

examples: Please complete your application with a valid certificate.

author.description: Author id (the caseworker's user id or the applicant's identifier)

inReplyToId.description: Id of the message this one replies to. Optional; when set it must reference a message on the same errand.

Decision.description: Decision recorded against an errand. Both system-generated decisions (e.g. a DMN-evaluated recommendation produced by a BPMN process) and human decisions (e.g. a handläggare approving a payment) are stored here, distinguished by `decisionType`. The list on the errand grows over time and is the audit trail of every decision made on the case.

decisionType.description: Decision category. Free-form string; conventionally `RECOMMENDATION` for DMN-produced suggestions and `PAYMENT` for handläggare APPROVE/REJECT decisions, but namespaces are encouraged to define their own.

value.description: Decision value. For binary outcomes use `APPROVED`/`REJECTED`; for richer outputs (e.g. a calculated amount) use the value itself or a short label.

description.description: Optional human-readable description or motivation for the decision
examples: Beslutsförslag enligt regelverk: 7900 kr, ingen varning

createdBy.description: Identifier of the actor that produced the decision. Use the handläggare userId for human decisions or a system identifier (e.g. `operaton`, `dmn-engine`) for automated ones.

PaymentStatusRequest.description: Request to read whether the Lifecare utbetalning for an application month has been effectuated.

applicationMonth.description: The application month (ISO year-month, yyyy-MM) the payment concerns

PaymentStatusResponse.description: Whether the Lifecare utbetalning for the application month has been effectuated.

effectuated.description: True when a Lifecare utbetalning concerning the application month has been registered

paymentDate.description: The date the utbetalning was made (Lifecare PayDate), when effectuated

NormberakningRequest.description: Request to build and post the SSBTEK-driven normberäkning for an application month.

coApplicant.description: The co-applicant's (medsökande) partyId (personId GUID), when applying together with a partner

errandId.description: The id of the caremanagement errand the normberäkning concerns. When present, a Decision(RECOMMENDATION) summarising the income warnings is recorded on the errand for the handläggare to review; when omitted, the normberäkning is built without recording a recommendation.

classifiedIncomes.description: The incomes classified by the operaton regelverk (the evaluate-income-regelverk worker output), as JSON. When present, caremanagement maps these to FC income rows instead of fetching SSBTEK and evaluating the rålista itself.

unhandledIncomes.description: The unhandled-income warnings from the operaton regelverk, recorded on the errand recommendation

changeWarnings.description: The period-over-period change warnings from the operaton regelverk, recorded on the errand recommendation

NormberakningResponse.description: The created Lifecare normberäkning id plus the income warnings to review.

calculationId.description: The id of the normberäkning created in Lifecare FC

unhandledIncomes.description: SSBTEK incomes that could not be auto-transferred and must be reviewed

changeWarnings.description: Förmåner whose net income changed beyond the threshold between the periods

informationComplete.description: Whether this month's normberäkning covers every income type the previous month's did — false means SSBTEK data is still missing and the process should poll again

missingIncomeTypes.description: Previous-month income types not yet present this month (the SSBTEK data still being awaited)

EligibilityRequest.description: Request to evaluate which financial assistance application a citizen should be offered.

coApplicant.description: The co-applicant's (medsökande) partyId (personId GUID), when applying together with a partner

ApplicationSuggestion.description: A suggested application the citizen can submit, with its target period.

typeSlug.description: The errand type slug to create the application against

applicationType.description: The application type the slug maps to

periodMonth.description: Month (1-12) the suggested application concerns. Null for a new application (nyansökan), which has no prior period.

periodYear.description: Year the suggested application concerns. Null for a new application (nyansökan).

recommended.description: True for the primary suggestion the citizen should be guided towards

label.description: Human-readable Swedish label for the suggestion

EligibilityResponse.description: Eligibility result: which application(s) the citizen should be offered, plus the supporting facts.

suggestions.description: Suggested applications, ordered with the recommended one first.

reasonCode.description: Machine-readable code for the gate that drove the suggestion

message.description: Human-readable Swedish explanation of the suggestion
examples: Öppet ärende utan beslut för innevarande månad. Föreslår återansökan.

existsInCm.description: True when the applicant already has an EB errand in caremanagement

existsInLc.description: True when the applicant has an EB footprint in Lifecare (aktualisering/beslut/normberäkning)

civilstandMatches.description: Whether the requested civilstånd (alone vs with a partner) matches the previous application. Null when not evaluated (no existing case).

windowDays.description: The duplicate-application window in days that was applied to the per-month check

applicationExistsThisMonth.description: True when an application/decision already exists for the current month

applicationExistsNextMonth.description: True when an application/decision already exists for next month

currentMonthDecided.description: True when Lifecare shows a decision for the current month (the current month is decided/closed)

latestDecisionPeriodMonth.description: Month (1-12) of the most recent Lifecare decision, when one exists

latestDecisionPeriodYear.description: Year of the most recent Lifecare decision, when one exists

hasPreviousCalculation.description: True when Lifecare shows a previous normberäkning

lifecareChecked.description: True when the Lifecare lookup succeeded. False means the answer is degraded (CM-only).

hasCoApplicant.description: True when the request included a co-applicant (medsökande)

ActualisationRequest.description: Request to create the Lifecare aktualisering (case intake) for an application month.

applicationMonth.description: The application month (ISO year-month, yyyy-MM); the aktualisering's intake date is the first day of this month

errandId.description: The id of the caremanagement errand the aktualisering concerns. When present, a Decision(ACTUALISATION) recording the created Lifecare aktualisering id is added to the errand's audit trail; when omitted, the aktualisering is created without recording anything on an errand.

actualisationId.description: The id of the aktualisering created in Lifecare FC

PatchErrand.description: PatchErrand model — patchable envelope fields only

errandId.description: Errand id this note belongs to

body.example: Spoke to family today, awaiting docs.

modifiedBy.description: User id of the last editor

modified.description: Last modified timestamp; null until the note has been edited

Warning.description: An EB income warning the handläggare can acknowledge or close.

sourceKey.description: A stable key for the income the warning concerns (förmån/inkomsttyp) — the dedup key

autoResolved.description: Whether the warning was closed automatically (its cause resolved) rather than by a handläggare

updated.description: When the warning was last updated

AssigneeCount.description: Number of errands assigned to a given user

count.description: Number of errands assigned to the user

StatisticsResponse.description: Aggregated errand statistics for the caseworker interface

total.description: Total number of errands in the selection

byAssignee.description: Number of errands per assigned user

unassigned.description: Number of errands without an assigned user

StatusCount.description: Number of errands in a given status

count.description: Number of errands in the status

totalRecords.description: Total amount of hits based on provided search parameters

totalPages.description: Total amount of pages based on provided search parameters

Message.description: A message in the errand's conversation

errandId.description: The errand the message belongs to

examples: Please complete your application with a valid certificate.

inReplyToId.description: Id of the message this one replies to, when it is a reply (same errand)

MessageAttachment.description: Metadata of a file attached to a message. Download the content via GET .../messages/{messageId}/attachments/{id}/file

senderRole.description: Who sent the file, derived from the message direction: CLIENT (applicant, INBOUND) or HANDLAGGARE (caseworker, OUTBOUND)

origin.description: Where the file came from: APPLICATION (citizen's application files), CONVERSATION (sent in a message thread), GENERATED (a consolidated PDF produced by the platform) or ERRAND (uploaded directly to the errand)

senderRole.description: Who the file came from: CLIENT (applicant) or HANDLAGGARE (caseworker). May be null for files predating the distinction or with no clear sender.

messageId.description: For CONVERSATION attachments, the id of the message the file is attached to — download it via .../messages/{messageId}/attachments/{id}/file. Null for non-conversation attachments, which download via .../attachments/{id}/file.

FinancialAssistanceView.description: A financial assistance errand with its typed application payload.

processInstanceId.description: Id of the started process instance

data.description: The typed financial assistance application payload

PrefilledChild.description: A child pre-filled from Lifecare for a financial assistance renewal. Carries only what Lifecare provides — personnummer and name; the citizen completes residence, school etc. on the form.

partyId.description: Party id (personId GUID) of the child

RenewalPrefill.description: Pre-fill data for a financial assistance renewal (återansökan): household children read from Lifecare.

children.description: Children in the household from the most recent normberäkning

lifecareChecked.description: True when the Lifecare lookup succeeded. False means the answer is degraded (empty children).

ErrandTypeSchema.description: Form descriptor for an errand type slug — statuses, roles and the fields its data payload should carry.

applicationType.description: The application-type variant the slug maps to, when the type exposes one; null otherwise

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the type

statuses.description: Allowed status codes for the type, sorted

roles.description: Stakeholder roles valid for the type

fields.description: The fields the type's data payload should carry, as form guidance

FieldDescriptor.description: Form-guidance descriptor for a single data field of an errand type.

required.description: True when the field is unconditionally required for the application types it applies to

options.description: Allowable values when type is ENUM, otherwise null

itemsRef.description: For ARRAY fields, the OpenAPI component name of the element shape (resolve via /api-docs); null otherwise

appliesTo.description: The application types that collect this field

condition.description: Human-readable gate describing when the field is collected, when conditional; null when always collected
